subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen giveth glad-tidings unto them that are turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon, and adorneth each one with the ornament of remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی متوجهین افق اعلی را بشارت میدهد و هر یک را بطراز ذکر مزین میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement
